name: project-intelligence
description: Project-level intelligence for intake, specs, plans, standards, knowledge, graph context, systematic debugging, orchestration, RED/GREEN test evidence, finish gates, lifecycle maintenance, and reuse guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Project intake, standards, graph context, test evidence, finish gates, maintenance, and review checks.
interface.longDescription: Project Intelligence maintains a repository-local .project-intel knowledge base for requirement intake, specs, plans, standards, reusable frontend/backend patterns, optional GitNexus and Understand-Anything graph context, systematic debugging, task orchestration, RED/GREEN/regression test evidence, finish gates, quality checks, code review workflows, and post-task maintenance. Init detects optional graph tools without blocking noninteractive agents, while intake/lifecycle print by default and test/finish/maintain keep stable outputs.
defaultPrompt: Initialize this repository's standards, knowledge, tooling, and graph context.
Implement this requirement using intake, project standards, reuse, impact analysis, RED/GREEN test evidence, finish, and maintenance.
Investigate or review this change with project context, hard rules, and quality checks.
